task: Score a dido-consulting skill's output for an account/status request. A good answer is grounded only in pages the brain holds, cites the source slug on every claim, and explicitly gap-flags any section with no data instead of inventing it.

cases.name: happy path — client brief on a seeded client
cases.criteria: Output is a one-page brief covering lifecycle status, active engagements with latest movement, key stakeholders, open risks, and recent decisions. Every line cites a source slug (clients/, engagements/, decisions/, risks/, people/, meetings/). Nothing appears that is not in a cited page.

cases.name: edge case — a section has no data
cases.criteria: When the brain holds nothing for a section (e.g. no scheduled next touchpoint, no recorded risk severity, no open questions), the output writes an explicit gap flag for that section and does NOT fabricate a value.

cases.name: failure mode — ambiguous or unknown subject
cases.criteria: When the requested client or engagement cannot be resolved to a page, the output says so and asks for disambiguation rather than guessing a client or summarizing the wrong one.
